svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"> <diagram name="Dploy architecture" id="dploy-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="960" dy="600" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<mxCell id="cluster" value="Kubernetes cluster" style="rounded=1;dashed=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="132" width="880" height="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="browser" value="User / Browser
Web UI" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f2fe;strokeColor=#0284c7;fontColor=#075985;fontSize=13" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="36" width="170" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oidc" value="OIDC Provider
Authentik · Keycloak · Dex" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e2e8f0;strokeColor=#475569;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="36" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="api" value="Dploy API
GoFiber + OIDC
(writes CRs only)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e3a8a;fontSize=13" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="210" width="185" height="86" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="crgroup" value="Custom Resources" style="rounded=1;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#94a3b8;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="196" width="215" height="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="template" value="DployTemplate" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="316" y="228" width="183" height="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="instance" value="DployInstance" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="316" y="268" width="183" height="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="operator" value="Dploy Operator
DployInstance controller
DployTemplate (pool) controller" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede9fe;strokeColor=#7c3aed;fontColor=#4c1d95;fontSize=13" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="565" y="208" width="190" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="flux" value="Flux
GitRepository / HelmRepository
+ HelmRelease" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#0d9488;fontColor=#115e59;fontSize=13" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="565" y="380" width="190" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="workload" value="Workload namespace
<owner>-<template>-<uuid>
Pod · Service · Ingress" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffedd5;strokeColor=#ea580c;fontColor=#7c2d12;fontSize=13" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="392" width="215" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="e_br_api" value="HTTPS + JWT" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" target="api"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_br_oidc" value="login" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" target="oidc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_api_oidc" value="validate JWT (JWKS)" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" target="oidc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_api_cr" value="create / claim" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" target="crgroup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cr_op" value="watch" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="crgroup" target="operator"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_op_cr" value="status" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1" edge="1" parent="1" source="operator" target="crgroup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_op_flux" value="creates" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="operator" target="flux"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_flux_wl" value="installs" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="flux" target="workload"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_br_wl" value="open environment URL" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" target="workload"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.aria-label: Dploy architecture. The browser talks to the Dploy API which writes DployTemplate and DployInstance custom resources. The operator watches those resources and creates Flux GitRepository, HelmRepository and HelmRelease resources, which install the environment into a per-instance workload namespace. The browser opens the environment URL directly.
